result.summary: Found 1 major issue: truncated text in the navigation menu that appears to be cut off.

issues.description: The navigation tab displays 'Hot Garr' which appears to be truncated text. It should likely read 'Hot Games' or similar, but the full text is cut off and not visible.
issues.suggestion: Either reduce the font size of navigation tabs, adjust the container width, or use text truncation with an ellipsis (...) to handle long text gracefully. Ensure all navigation labels are fully visible.
